description: Filtered version of the multi-ecosystem catalog using only yandex and aqara ecosystems (tuya excluded). 2 lamps + 2 sensors + 2 plugs. Smaller candidate pool than synth_006 - faster brute force, cleaner Pareto front showing just the yandex-direct vs aqara-bridge trade-off. Good for verifying bridge behavior in isolation before running synth_006.
